revision_note: Second pass — redesigned scope: 160 sqm, no pool. Per DG-09 reject and Felipe redesign.
contractor_pricing_source: Updated preliminary estimates from same 2 local contractors after scope reduction (160 sqm, no pool). Contractor A: $192,000 USD; Contractor B: $198,000 USD. Average used as baseline.
alignment_notes: Revised contractor pricing at $195,000 USD is 2.5% BELOW the client budget of $200,000 USD — well within the ≤10% threshold for 'proceed'. Scope reduction (remove pool, reduce from 216 sqm to 160 sqm) achieved the necessary cost reduction of ~$185,000 USD. Budget is now aligned. Client budget of $200K provides a $5,000 contingency buffer against contractor pricing. Recommend proceeding to executive plans.
